outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump, Iran locked in high-stakes standoff as economic pain mounts
outlets.summary: WaPo frames standoff as a high-stakes economic test for both sides. Brent retreated from $126 wartime high. CENTCOM briefs Trump on three military options. Hegseth grilled six hours by Senate; $25B war cost confirmed (CNN reports actual $40-50B).

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: The Iran war now has a price tag ($25 billion), but still no end date
outlets.summary: Pentagon comptroller reveals $25B cost. Focus on munitions depletion (45% PrSM, 50% THAAD/Patriot). Democrats challenge Hegseth on nuclear contradiction. War Powers deadline May 1.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: 'Finish what we started' — Gen. Keane urges decisive Iran action
outlets.summary: Op-ed by Gen. Jack Keane: half-war is 'dangerous outcome.' Frames Trump's CENTCOM briefing as the necessary moment to finish the campaign. Sympathetic to deeper kinetic action ahead of War Powers deadline.

outlets.name: RedState
outlets.headline: Windward AI Uncovers Iran's New $800M Oil Smuggling Plot With Fake Iraqi Tankers
outlets.summary: Right-wing outlet emphasizes Iran's continuing illicit oil trade as justification for ongoing US pressure. $800M scheme exposed by maritime intelligence firm Windward AI.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Israel kills 28 in Lebanon; Hegseth faces tough questioning
outlets.summary: Liveblog: 'Black Wednesday' Israeli strikes kill 28 across 23 villages in southern Lebanon. CENTCOM briefs Trump on military options. Brent retreats to $114.66 after intraday $126 wartime high. Pezeshkian: blockade 'doomed to fail.'

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Oil prices soar on fears of long supply disruption, US siege of Iran ports
outlets.summary: Wire-style coverage of oil market reaction to CENTCOM briefing. Brent peaked $126; profit-taking pulled it back to $114.66. UAE OPEC exit takes effect May 1.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: 12 IDF soldiers wounded by Hezbollah drone in northern Israel; IDF strikes 23 villages in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Liveblog highlights: Hezbollah fiber-optic FPV drone evades IDF EW jamming and strikes M548 carrier near Shomera; Israel responds with massive air campaign across S. Lebanon (28 killed). IDF Chief Zamir: 'no ceasefire' on Lebanon front.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: 750,000 Israelis Unemployed Amid Wars With Iran, Hezbollah in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Broad unemployment 16.2%; 750,000 Israelis without work as wartime economy strains. Defense ~8% of GDP. Debt-to-GDP projected 70.5% by year end.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: 'A new chapter': Leader says Iran will determine 'new legal rules' in Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Persian Gulf Day message from Mojtaba Khamenei: 'future without America' in Hormuz, vows to protect nuclear and missile capabilities as 'national assets.' Iran framing US blockade as already defeated.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran has every right to counter US's state-sponsored piracy, terrorism: UN envoy
outlets.summary: Iran's UN envoy frames US naval blockade as 'state-sponsored piracy.' Argues international law gives Iran full right to retaliate. Doubles down on Pezeshkian's 'doomed to fail' message.
